2282840.name: AGIS
2282840.description:
FIGHT. DIE. UPGRADE. FIGHT AGAIN.


AGIS is a rouge-lite 2D action space shooter. You'll die often, you'll die soon, but you will get better with each run. You'll fight big and small enemies with many weapons and tactics. Protect the mothership and fight against thousands of enemies to find a way out of a trap.

Playable with Mouse/Keyboard and Twin-Stick-Controller.

The features are fast-paced, intense combat against challenging boss battles, a unique art style, and an electronic music soundtrack. The game also includes a mix of melee and ranged combat, with players having to learn and master the patterns of each boss to defeat them. Additionally, the game has a high replay value as the player will have to improve skills to progress in the game.
2282840.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
